text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Mejiro family boasts a long-distance
specialist.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Specifically, a magnificent stayer who won the
Kikuka Sho and the spring Tenno Sho
back-to-back.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, Bright. Am I to understand that you'd like
me to take charge of your long-distance training?
choice_data_list: Yeah. We need your help, Mejiro McQueen.
Yeah. We need your help, Mejiro McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I humbly request your coaching. I shall do
whatever it takes to ensure my performance at
the Kikuka Sho is sublime...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I wish to contribute as gloriously as you have to
the Mejiro name, McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
To contribute to the Mejiro name... Bright, I am
aware that you've been yearning to do that for
years.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Very well. I shall lend you my assistance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the Mejiro McQueen-led long-distance
training regimen gets underway...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Huff, pant, huff... McQueen, I have never run for so long in my life...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
My heart is pounding like a drum, and everything
around me is spinning... I can hardly breathe...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
That's because your cardiopulmonary system is
struggling to keep up. The burden placed on it by
the spring and fall Classics is on an entirely
different level, you see...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
As such, if you are to perform well in each of the
Triple Crown races, you must break through the
wall that stands before you this summer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The Japanese Derby is 2,400 meters, and the
Kikuka Sho 3,000. You'll be needing a great deal
of stamina to conquer that 600-meter difference.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
During my time competing in the Classics, I
ignored the spring Classics and focused
exclusively on the Kikuka Sho and the spring
Tenno Sho. In other words...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I was able to win precisely because I began
specializing in long-distance races very early on.
To put it yet another way...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
If one who has yet to specialize is to perform well,
they must completely transform both their mind
and body over the course of the summer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
And Bright, judging from your running in the
Satsuki Sho and the Japanese Derby, you do
strike me as a runner suited to medium distances,
much like Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
With that in mind, if you are to begin your climb
to the sheer heights I scaled, you must be
prepared to shoulder a great burden.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Have you the drive necessary to overcome that
pain and achieve your goal?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: The drive... to achieve my goal...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Of course... I have the drive. I am more
profoundly, fiercely, and utterly determined than
anyone else in the world. And it's because I've a
reason to be...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Is it because that's how fully you wish to devote
yourself to the Mejiro family?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I don't wish simply for that alone... I wish to
become its new light.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
A light that can illuminate even further beyond
the paradigm that you and Ryan have set.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
As one who has always been a burden, I feel it is
imperative that I exert myself to the absolute
limit. Otherwise, I'll fail to become even the
faintest of sparkles.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Pushing yourself "to the absolute limit" to become
the "new light"...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...Trainer, Bright has expressed quite the
ambition, but do I have your permission to push
her to her absolute limit?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Because coaching her properly will entail running
her mind and body ragged. Knowing this, will you
allow me to go ahead with it?
choice_data_list: Yes, give her what she needs.
Yes, give her what she needs.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I answer without hesitation. She'll probably suffer
at first, and come close to collapse before we're
done, but even then...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I know Mejiro Bright will make it all work out in
the end. That's just who she is.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Your faith is unwavering, I see. And your
willingness to wait for Bright is similarly valuable.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Very well. Let's get started, Bright. You're still a
great distance from where you need to be. Come
along now!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Yes... Lead the way, McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days pass...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I feel I've finally gotten accustomed to this
running style, McQueen. Do you feel I've
improved at all?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Y-yes... Bright, you've...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's nothing.
But to think you'd come this far...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Now then, the time has come to fine-tune your
technique. Your final test... is to face me in an
exhibition.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
But let's have a little fun with it. Trainer, in which
manner of event should we compete?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She gives me two options. I think Mejiro Bright
should go head-to-head with Mejiro McQueen
in...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Wrestling... I accept. A sport in which competitors
are sent crashing against the sand the moment
their stamina is depleted.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Let's get changed, Bright. We can hardly wrestle
dressed as we are.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Let's go over the rules. Grabbing one another's
swimsuits is against the rules. We are to grasp
only for the arms, legs, and waist. Understood?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Now, show me what you can do!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Ahhh... La la laaa...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what are you doing? Why is your stance so
lackadaisical?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Ha-yah!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: What?! You transitioned from that casual stance to a tackle?! Were you trying to catch me off guard?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright's elusively floaty movements might
not be a deliberate wrestling tactic, but they
leave Mejiro McQueen utterly unable to fight
back...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... You put up quite the fight. I'd say your wrestling today really shows how far you've come.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, thank you very much. Though, I appear to
have gotten sand everywhere...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the wrestling match between the Mejiros
is decided, with Mejiro Bright leaving the ring
stronger than when she stepped in.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Long-distance swimming... Very well. This will
constitute an entirely different challenge from
running on solid ground.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
We shall begin the moment we've changed into
our swimsuits, Bright. We'll race to that island and
back!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the long-distance swimming race begins.
However...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: She's slow... She's terribly slow. I finished quite some time ago, and yet...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
What in the world is she doing? No, don't tell me
something's happened to her...
choice_data_list: Give her a few more minutes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If this were anyone else, I'd be worried—but this is
Mejiro Bright we're talking about. Her taking this
long seems about right.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And that's when...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Whew... Sorry I took so long, McQueen...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh dear. I thought so. I've lost, haven't I?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Bright! What happened out there?! Are you all
right?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Well, I got swept up in rather a strong current
along the way and found myself bobbing about a
bit...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Surely you don't mean the rip current?! And then
what happened?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Well, I thought that was part of the test as well.
So I let the current carry me off, and then when it
was finished...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I had a nice, casual swim back over here. Thanks
to all your training, McQueen, I had the stamina
to make it through.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: You let yourself drift away on purpose? Sigh... I'm not sure whether that was careless or incredibly bold.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
But I'm glad to see that you're safe.
And Trainer, I must say you're doing a terrific job
of matching Bright's pace.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen delivers her compliment with a
forced smile. It seems as if the unexpected
developments of the swimming competition have
boosted Mejiro Bright's mental fortitude.
